      "text": "Un Josuü̈s uszehle schohs
diwipadefinitis Akminns Gilga-
lâ / ko tee no Jardanas bij neh.
muschi."
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch runnaja us teem
Israëta Behrneem / fazzidains:
Rad juhſu Behrni turpmahl fa-
wus Tehwus waizahs/un tazzihs:
Kamt fchee Akmint?"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs jums fawcem
Behrneem Sixnu doht / un faz-
ziht : Israëls irr faufahm Rah-
jahin za ur fcho Jardanu gahjis."
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS juhſu
Deews irr to Jardanas Uhdeni
juhu Preekscha lizzis iſtikt / tee-
kams juhs bijat pahrgahjuschi/
ittia ka tas KUNGS juhſu
Deews darrijs irr Needru-Juh-
xâ / ko wiꞥſch muhſu Preekscha
likke iſtikt / teekams mehs bijam
zaurgahjuschi."
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht / ka tee Landis
wiſſa Semmê ta KUNGA Roh-
fu atſihſt / zeek stipra ta irr / ka
juhs bihstatees to KUNGU juhfo
Deewu wiſſa Laikâ."
    },
    {
      "n": �,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta V. Nodalla.
Tee Amoriteri un Kananiteri isbihſtahs preckſch
Israëia Behrneem: 1. Josuü̈s apgraisa
tohs Landis/kas Tukſneſi dsimmufschi : 2. Un
turr tohs Paſa-Swehtkus Gilgalâ : 10.
Ta Debbes Maife mittejahs : 12. Tas
Derwa Dehls parahdahs Josuü̈m weenâ
Zilweka Gihmi ar weenu plifku Sohbinu: 13
1. N tas notiffahs / kad
wiſſi Amoriteru Kehni-
hi / kas fchai puſs Jar-"
    },
    {
      "n": �,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "danas prett Wakkaru (Dsthwo-
ja)/ un wiſſi Kananiteru Kehnih-
Juhr Mallâ dsirdeja / ka ta
KUNGS to Jardanas Uhden-
preeksch teem Israëta Behrneen
lizzis iſtikt/ teekans tee bijazau-
gabjuschi / tad tappe wun-
Sirks baſliga / un teem ne btj-
wairs ne kahdas Drohſchiba-
preeksch teem Israëta Behrneem
2. Tanni Laikâ fazzija ta-
KUNGS us Josuü̈: Darri fen-
akminainus Naschus/ un apgrai-
st atkat tohs Israëta Behrne-
ohtrâ Reisê.
3. Tad darrija Josuü̈s sew ak-
minainus Naschus/un apgraisija
tohs Israëta Behrnus us to Pa-
kalnu Aralot.
4. Un feht irr ta Leeta / kadeh-
Josuü̈s tohs apgraisija / wiſſ
Landis/kas noEgiptes-Semmes-
bija iſgahjuschi no Wihra-Kahr-
tas / wiſſi Karra-Wihri bija no-
mirruschi Tukſneti us Zettu / no-
Egiptes-Semmes iſeiſoht.
5. Jo wiſſi Landis/kas iſgah-
je / bija apgraisiti. Bet wiſſi
Landis/ kas Tukſneti us to Zet-
tu bij dsimmuschi no Egiptes-
Semmes iſeiſoht/tee ne bija ap-
graisiti.
6. Jo Israëta Behrni staigaja
tschetrdefinitis Gaddus Tukſneti/
teekams wiſſi Karra-Wihri bija
bohjâ gabjuschi / kas no Egiptes-
Semmes bija iſgahjuschi/ kas ta
KUNGA Balkſnei ne bija pa-
klautigi bijuschi/ kam tas KUNGS
bij swehrejs / ka wiſſch teem to
Semmi"
